The Founder's Story

From a Dream in
Colombo to the Gulf

I started Azmar & Co because I wanted to do something that mattered — not just for myself, but for the people and products I love. Growing up in Colombo, my childhood summers were spent in Matale at my grandmother’s home, surrounded by the aroma of freshly rolled cinnamon, sun-dried pepper, and tea leaves drying in the highland air. Those experiences weren’t just memories — they were lessons in care, patience, and quality.

As I grew older, I began visiting local markets and small farms with my family, watching the dedication and skill that went into every harvest. I saw how much care went into cultivating each cinnamon stick, peppercorn, and tea leaf, yet how little recognition the farmers received for their work. That contrast between the quality of the product and the value it ultimately received fascinated me — and I started imagining a way to bring these authentic Sri Lankan goods directly to international buyers who would truly appreciate them.

I saw something the world wasn't fully seeing yet — Sri Lanka's agricultural products are among the finest on earth, yet so much of it was reaching international buyers through layers of middlemen, losing quality, authenticity, and story along the way.

2024
spent months traveling across Sri Lanka’s key growing regions — visiting cinnamon plantations in Galle and Negombo, spice gardens in Matale, and tea estates in Nuwara Eliya — learning directly from growers and building trusted sourcing relationships.
Early 2025
I founded Azmar & Co with one clear mission: to connect Sri Lanka's finest agricultural products directly to GCC buyers — cutting out the chain, keeping the quality.
Present
Building long-term partnerships across the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Oman, Kuwait, and Bahrain — Every order is managed meticulously — from sourcing and grading to packaging, documentation, and shipment — to meet international expectations.

"I don't just want to export products. I want to export the story of Sri Lanka — its soil, its people, and its centuries of agricultural heritage — into every kitchen and household across the Gulf."

— Azmar, Founder

Azmar & Co — Pure Ceylon.
Colombo, Sri Lanka · Founded 2025 · Serving the GCC

The Azmar Difference

Why Choose Azmar & Co?

Five reasons why GCC importers, wholesalers, and retail buyers choose us — backed by principle, not just promise.

🌿
Farm-Direct Sourcing

We work directly with verified Sri Lankan farms and certified cooperatives. No middlemen. No compromised quality. Pure provenance, every shipment.

🏅
Grade Transparency

Every product is graded, documented, and accompanied by Certificates of Origin and quality analysis. You know exactly what you're buying before it ships.

🚢
End-to-End Export

We handle the full export chain — sourcing, packaging, documentation, customs, and freight coordination — so you receive your order without the operational stress.

📦
Flexible MOQ

Start with a sample order. Scale as confidence grows. We accommodate quantities from 50 kg trial shipments to full container loads, with no pressure and full support.

🤝
Founder-Led Service

When you contact Azmar & Co, you speak directly with the founder. No sales team. No generic responses. Real conversations and real accountability.

01
Ceylon Cinnamon is Irreplaceable

True Ceylon cinnamon (Cinnamomum verum) contains 50–70× less coumarin than the Cassia variety dominating global markets. For health-conscious GCC consumers, this is not a preference — it's a priority. We supply the real thing, with provenance documentation to prove it.

02
The GCC Demands What Sri Lanka Grows

The Gulf's food culture — from Arabic coffee with cardamom to aromatic biryanis with quality cinnamon and cloves — is built on spices Sri Lanka has produced for over 500 years. We bridge this natural connection with consistent, premium-grade supply.

03
Authenticity Cannot Be Faked

Every shipment from Azmar & Co comes with full traceability — Certificate of Origin from the Ceylon Chamber of Commerce, Phytosanitary Certificate, and batch-level quality records. Your buyers can trust the product. We make that trust documentable.
